item.title: Sensex Slumps Over 2% as Market Breadth Narrows Amid Sector-Wide Declines
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a sharp decline on 9 March 2026, with the Sensex falling 2.28% to trade at 77,123.40, extending its recent downtrend amid weak global cues and subdued investor sentiment. Market breadth was heavily skewed towards declines, reflecting broad-based selling pressure across sectors, while the IT sector emerged as the lone outperformer, providing some respite to investors. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 2.82% on the day and registering a sharper fall of 3.89% over the past five trading sessions. This performance contrasts with the segment’s recent reputation as a market outperformer, highlighting growing investor caution amid broader market volatility. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Midcap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, experienced a notable downturn on 9 Mar 2026, declining by 2.59% in a single session and registering a 4.07% loss over the past five trading days. This broad-based weakness was accompanied by a severely negative advance-decline ratio, signalling widespread selling pressure across the mid-cap universe. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining 2.36% on the day and nearly 4% over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness was underscored by a lopsided advance-decline ratio, with only 7 stocks advancing against 93 decliners, signalling widespread selling pressure. Within this challenging environment, defensive and cyclical stocks have displayed contrasting fortunes, highlighting investor caution amid uncertain market conditions. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Varroc Engineering Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 9 March 2026
item.description: Varroc Engineering Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 9 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 475, down 7.6% from the previous close. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market amid widespread selling pressure and negative market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Synoptics Technologies Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Synoptics Technologies Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 9 Mar 2026, marking a maximum daily loss of 4.99%. The stock closed at ₹47.6, exactly at its lower price band, reflecting intense selling pressure and a sharp decline in investor confidence. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Exxaro Tiles Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Exxaro Tiles Ltd, a micro-cap player in the diversified consumer products sector, witnessed a sharp decline on 9 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit as intense selling pressure gripped the stock. The share price plunged by 4.18%, closing at ₹6.87, marking a maximum daily loss that reflects mounting investor concerns and a sustained downtrend over recent sessions. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Panache Digilife Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Panache Digilife Ltd, a micro-cap player in the IT - Hardware sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 9 Mar 2026, closing at ₹308.20 after a steep fall of 4.55% in a single trading session. The stock witnessed intense selling pressure, with volumes reflecting panic selling and a significant unfilled supply, signalling investor apprehension amid broader sectoral weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Globe International Carriers Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Globe International Carriers Ltd, a micro-cap player in the transport services sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 9 Mar 2026, closing at ₹44.53, down 4.99% on the day. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting intense selling pressure and panic among investors. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Inspirisys Solutions Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Inspirisys Solutions Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, faced intense selling pressure on 9 Mar 2026, triggering the lower circuit limit. The stock’s sharp intraday decline and unfilled supply highlight growing investor concerns despite recent gains, signalling a potential shift in market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Bafna Pharmaceuticals Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Bafna Pharmaceuticals Ltd plunged to their lower circuit limit on 9 Mar 2026, closing at ₹106.59, marking a maximum daily loss of 4.99%. The stock witnessed intense selling pressure, with volumes concentrated near the day’s low, signalling panic selling and unfilled supply in the micro-cap pharmaceutical firm. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: DEE Development Engineers Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: DEE Development Engineers Ltd, a key player in the industrial manufacturing sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 9 Mar 2026, propelled by robust buying interest and a significant intraday price rally. The stock outperformed its sector and benchmark indices despite a challenging market backdrop, signalling heightened investor enthusiasm and unfilled demand. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: IL&FS Engineering & Construction Co Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: IL&FS Engineering & Construction Co Ltd (BZ series) witnessed a sharp decline on 9 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit of Rs 22.85, marking a maximum daily loss of 4.99%. The stock’s performance underlines intense selling pressure and panic among investors, as it underperformed both its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Kesoram Industries Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Kesoram Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Cement & Cement Products sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 9 Mar 2026, reflecting intense selling pressure and a sharp loss of investor confidence. The stock closed at ₹8.33, down 4.92% on the day, underperforming both its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Kore Digital Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Kore Digital Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Telecom - Equipment & Accessories sector, surged to hit its upper circuit price limit on 9 Mar 2026, closing at ₹122.5. This 2.0% daily gain outpaced both its sector and the broader Sensex, reflecting robust buying interest despite subdued investor participation and a regulatory freeze on further price movement. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Lancor Holdings Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Lancor Holdings Ltd, a micro-cap player in the realty sector, witnessed a sharp decline on 9 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit of ₹21.82 after a day marked by intense selling pressure and heightened volatility. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting investor apprehension amid deteriorating technical and fundamental indicators. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Cerebra Integrated Technologies Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Cerebra Integrated Technologies Ltd, a micro-cap player in the IT - Hardware sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 9 Mar 2026, reflecting intense selling pressure and panic among investors. The stock closed at ₹4.75, down 2.26% on the day, marking its maximum permissible daily loss and underscoring the challenges facing the company amid a broader sector downturn. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Tera Software Ltd Shares Plunge to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Tera Software Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, witnessed a sharp decline on 9 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit with a maximum daily loss of 4.99%. The stock closed at ₹361.7, down ₹19 from the previous close, reflecting intense selling pressure and panic among investors amid falling participation and unfilled supply. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Data Patterns (India) Ltd Sees Robust Trading Activity Amid Sector Stability
item.description: Data Patterns (India) Ltd, a prominent player in the Aerospace & Defense sector, has emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 9 March 2026, reflecting heightened investor interest and significant institutional participation. The stock’s performance, trading volumes, and recent upgrades underscore its evolving market stature amid a broadly stable sector environment. Time: 1 hour ago
